overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban underpass at night. The scene features wet pavement reflecting vibrant magenta, blue, and green neon lights, with large digital billboards and concrete architectural elements creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with commercial advertising

events.description: passing the large digital billboard on the left, which moves out of direct view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing large digital advertisements on the left

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying promotional text and imagery
massive concrete elevated highway structure overhead
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass
wet concrete sidewalk reflecting neon lights
yellow construction or safety barriers along the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk under a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city at night. A large digital billboard dominates the left side while the wet pavement reflects the ambient neon lighting. The environment is empty of people, creating a solitary atmosphere as the camera moves forward through the sheltered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian corridor with vertical lighting panels

events.description: vertical light panels on the right become more prominent, shifting illumination patterns
approaching the open underpass area with visible magenta neon lighting ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the enclosed corridor section with tall vertical light panels illuminating the right side

entered.detail: tall rectangular illuminated panels emitting bright white light
smooth dark concrete wall of the corridor
poster showing medical imagery and text on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the enclosed corridor, the large billboard is left behind as vertical light panels dominate the right wall. The space becomes more confined with concrete walls close on both sides. In the distance, a pink glow hints at the upcoming open area, creating anticipation as the corridor progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: large open underpass intersection with magenta neon lighting

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into the expansive underpass area bathed in magenta neon light
magenta lighting intensifies and shifts to pink-orange hues as the camera moves forward

agents.ego_description: entering the expansive underpass area bathed in magenta neon light, with futuristic skyscrapers visible rising above

entered.detail: walls illuminated with intense magenta and pink neon lighting
high concrete ceiling of the expansive underpass structure
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows visible above the underpass
paved road surface with white lane markings
long fluorescent light fixtures on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens dramatically into a vast underpass area dominated by intense magenta and pink neon lighting. The corridor walls give way to an expansive space with asphalt roads and towering futuristic skyscrapers visible above. The lighting shifts dynamically between magenta, pink, and orange hues as the camera moves through this cyberpunk urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a solitary concrete walkway into a vast, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins under a massive overpass where a large digital billboard casts light across wet, reflective pavement. As the camera moves deeper into the environment, the space becomes more confined, shifting from the open walkway into a narrow corridor lined with vertical light panels. The scene then opens dramatically as the walls give way to an expansive underpass, where the lighting transforms into intense magenta, pink, and orange hues. Finally, the view expands to reveal asphalt roads and towering futuristic skyscrapers looming above the vibrant cyberpunk landscape.
